series_metadata.series_description: These are quarterly reports detailing statements of assets and liabilities, income and expenses of each bank and trust department. These reports are now maintained electronically by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation and available on its website.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed on the computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility until no longer of administrative value, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files until no longer of administrative value, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
